data.name: 我與魅魔上司的同居生活
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


關於此遊戲



【遊戲故事】

身為園區工程師的高級社畜，你成為了無情的賺錢機器，
因為高強度的工作導致毫無生活品質、
論及婚嫁的女友也因此跑了。
這還不夠，在公司還得面臨擁有美麗外表卻蛇蠍心腸的女老闆無情的霸凌與壓榨…！
怨恨與不滿持續累積，就在身心瀕臨崩潰的時候，你在社畜論壇上，
看到了召喚魅魔的方法，讓你透過性愛來獲得療癒…
沒想到召喚出來的巨乳魅魔「沙九葉」，卻跟你恨之入骨的老闆長的一模一樣，
然而你的身體還是不爭氣的對她起了反應…在又愛又恨的狀態下，
你與沙九葉肉慾橫流、香豔火辣的同居生活即將展開！

【遊戲角色】

擁有天使般的外表、魔鬼般的身材，但個性卻極其惡劣的女老闆Peggy。
透過魅魔契約召喚出來、長的卻與Peggy一模一樣的魅魔沙九葉。
圍繞在你們之間的故事就這麼展開了！

【遊戲特色】

※H場景超色氣全語音！

遊戲中所有H場景，都有渲染力極強的配音，全方位滿足你的感官體驗！
請盡情體驗妹子們充滿色氣的淫聲浪語吧！

※全Live2D，超精緻動態讓你慾罷不能！

遊戲中包含立繪與所有CG都是栩栩如生的Live2D，讓您身歷其境；
帶來比看A片還要香豔刺激的視覺饗宴。

※重磅大佬畫師HEIJUN主筆！

由推特擁有20多萬粉絲、重磅紳士繪師HEIJUN主筆，筆下的魅魔沙九葉，
從頭髮到腳趾都透漏著讓人血脈噴張的淫慾氣息！

※同居養成玩法，帶入感十足的互動

透過各種對話與互動，充分感受沙九葉迷人又傲嬌的魅力！
在日益了解對方的同時，也將解鎖更多的H場景。

※夜幕降臨，在床上使出渾身解數，滿足你的她吧！

在重要的色情玩法除了全程Live2D，也提供各式各樣的互動。使出渾身解數，
讓你的她在床上達到多重高潮，一起爽到翻天！

※全程滑鼠，一鍵操作

紳士遊戲還要用到兩隻手？你在跟我開玩笑吧？另外一隻手的作用，相信你我都明白。

data.short_description: 每天被美麗卻惡劣的女老闆像狗一樣壓榨，身心即將崩潰的你，想透過召喚魅魔來紓壓...沒想到召喚出來的魅魔卻與你痛恨的老闆長得一模一樣！透過各種同居中的親密互動，更加了解傲嬌又迷人的沙九葉吧！紳士大手HEIJUN主筆，全LIVE2D！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Catalina 10.15.7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04 or Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體

data.name: Daily life with my succubus boss
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


About the Game



The Story


You, a soulless money-making machine enslaved by a heartless corporation as an engineer, have endured a life of hardship and misery. The relentless demands of your job not only deteriorated your quality of life but also drove away your fiancé.

But there's more to this story. Your boss, who hides her callous nature behind her attractive facade, subjects you to daily bullying and oppression.

As your hatred and resentment reach their boiling point, fate intervenes. You encounter an eccentric old man who unveils the art of summoning a succubus—a creature of desire who can heal your wounds with a touch of irresistible love. And to your surprise, the seductive succubus named Sakyuuba bears an uncanny resemblance to your despised boss.

Now caught between love and hate, you find yourself torn as conflicting emotions consume your being. Can you endure living under the same roof with the bane of your existence and the ultimate object of your desire?

Characters


Your boss, Peggy, may look like an angel, but those curves are certainly born of sin. Don't be fooled by her looks, for she's a nasty, vicious bitch. After signing a succubus contract, you summon Sakyuuba the succubus, who looks exactly like Peggy. What stories shall unfold between you two? We shall see!

Features

※Adult scenes with full-on, sensual audio!


To ensure all your sensory needs are fulfilled, all the adult scenes in the game have super intense voice acting! Dive into the sexy sounds of dirty-talking babes!

※Live2D: Highly detailed animations that'll rev yer desires!


Character visuals and CGs use Live2D to bring the experience to life. Get ready for a visual feast that's so sweet you'll never go back to porn.

※Master Artist TAMADA HEIJUN!


Sakyuuba the succubus is drawn by the master artist TAMADA HEIJUN (200K Twitter followers!!!). From her hair down to her toes, this babe exudes nothing but super sexy, sensual vibes!

※Cohabitation simulation gameplay, lifelike interactions!


Interact with and talk to Sakyuuba to experience her haughty, naughty personality! The more you get to know her, the more... "secrets" will be unlocked (Adult scenes, dummy).

※The curtain of night has fallen... Give it your all, and please the woman that belongs to you!


During the sex scenes, players can not only enjoy the delights of Live2D, there's also tons of ways to interact and... play. Do your best to make her cum and cum again, until the light of day has come!

※Controls: Mouse, 1-Click


Two hands... for an adult game!? You kidding me!? Everyone knows what the other hand's controlling.

data.short_description: You summon a succubus to escape the torment at work, only to find that she looks just like your abusive boss! Can you endure living under the same roof with the bane of your existence and the ultimate object of your desire?
data.supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
